sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَاسِرٌ يَخَافُ مِنَ الاِمْتِحَانَاتِ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translationEn: Yasir was very afraid of exams.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ مَعَهُ أُخْتُهُ تُرَاجِعُ الدُّرُوسَ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sestra je sjedila s njim i ponavljala gradivo svake večeri.
sentences.translationEn: His sister sat with him reviewing the lessons every night.

sentences.translation: Uz njenu pomoć Jasir se osjećao samopouzdanije.
sentences.translationEn: With her help Yasir felt more confident.

sentences.arabic: نَجَحَ فِي الاِمْتِحَانِ وَشَكَرَ أُخْتَهُ بِصِدْقٍ.
sentences.translation: Položio je ispit i iskreno zahvalio sestri.
sentences.translationEn: He passed the exam and sincerely thanked his sister.
